name: found-a-mission
description: Found a Mission — Unit 2 Texas History building/management game (TEKS 7.2C, 7.2B, 7.9A). Play a Franciscan friar founding an East Texas mission among the Caddo, 1690–1731 (solo, one class-wide group) — over a server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center reporting one class-wide accuracy group.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
